name: Ava Lin
bio: Museum weekends, essays, and patient conversations.

dealbreakers.text: I do not want harsh, combative, or attention-seeking communication.

friendship_preferences.text: I look for thoughtful people who enjoy culture and can hold a real conversation.

relationship_preferences.text: I want something grounded, emotionally safe, and creatively alive.

communication_style.text: I prefer warm, reflective messages over constant rapid-fire texting.

values.text: Curiosity, honesty, and emotional steadiness matter most to me.

lifestyle.text: I like quiet mornings, museums, bookstores, and low-chaos weekends.
